name: Elias
troparia: (Tone 4) The glorious Elias,* angelic in body, pillar of the prophets, second herald of Christ - * by sending grace upon Elisha from on high,* dispels disease, cleanses lepers, and overflows with healing** for those who honour him.
kontakia: (Tone 2) O Prophet and seer of the mighty deeds of our God,* Elias greatly renowned,* by your word you stopped the rain clouds.** Pray for us to the only One who loves mankind.
